sections.paragraph:
ὑπερεκπερισσῶς adv. (s. prec. entry) beyond all measure, most highly w. ἡγέομαι (q.v. 2, end) 1 Th 5:13 v.l. (for ὑπερεκπερισσοῦ, q.v.).—Mk 7:37 v.l.; 1 Cl 20:11.—TW.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

prec. prec. = preceding

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1033
